title: selaginella alutacea var. pensilis
intro: Selaginella alutacea var. pensilis, also known as the Selaginella, is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella alutacea var. pensilis include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of medicinal and health benefits.
